info.name: Viam Fleet Management API
info.description:
REST/JSON transcoding of the Viam AppService gRPC API. Manage organizations, locations,
machines (robots), machine parts, fragments, OAuth apps, and team memberships in the
viam.app cloud.

Canonical contract: https://github.com/viamrobotics/api/blob/main/proto/viam/app/v1/app.proto


Contact Support:
 Name: Viam Support
